1521.title: SMS with emoji shows 58 characters but charged for 2 segments
1521.description:
Issue with SMS character counting. Sent message with emoji showing 58 characters (under 160 limit) but charged for 2 SMS segments.

Message 'Hello! 👋 Your package arrives today 📦' shows as 58 characters but emoji count as 2 characters each in SMS encoding.

Sent SMS at https://notifications.company.internal/sms/send. Character counter showed 58/160 but carrier billed for 2 segments ($0.02 instead of $0.01).

This is in the Notification Communication Service, SMS module, character counting. Production environment, Account: company-sms-prod, Project: SMS-COUNT-01.

Chrome 119 on Windows 11, timestamp 2026-02-06 10:50:22 CET. Affects all SMS with emoji.

Our SMS costs are 50% higher than budgeted. We send 10,000 SMS daily with 30% containing emoji. Wrong counting costs us $15/day or $450/month.

Customers surprised by costs and we can't budget accurately. Character counter needs to match actual SMS encoding.

This should be fixed soon to control costs and provide accurate estimates.

1522.title: Late fee $102.50 for 2 months when should be $100 - using compound interest
1522.description:
Issue with late fees. $1,000 invoice 2 months overdue shows $102.50 in late fees when should be $100 (5% × $1,000 × 2).

Contract specifies simple interest but calculation seems to use compound interest. After 2 months: $1,000 × 1.05² - $1,000 = $102.50.

Viewing invoice INV-2024-8847 at https://billing.company.internal/invoices. Late fee shows $102.50 for 2 months at 5% monthly rate.

This is in the Payment Billing Service, invoice module, late fee calculation. Production environment, Account: company-billing-prod, Project: INV-FEE-01.

Safari 17 on macOS 14.1, timestamp 2026-02-06 09:00:47 EST. Affects all multi-month overdue invoices.

Customers complaining about excessive fees. Some threaten legal action saying we're breaching contract by using compound interest.

We have 200 overdue invoices. Wrong calculation overcharges customers by 2-5% on late fees. Could be contract breach.

This is urgent - need to fix calculation and may need to issue credits. Legal notified.

1523.title: Recommendations showing iPhone I bought yesterday
1523.description:
Issue with product recommendations. Bought iPhone 15 yesterday and today homepage recommending I buy another iPhone 15.

Recommendations should filter out items I already own and suggest accessories or related products instead.

Viewed recommendations at https://shop.company.internal after purchasing order ORD-2024-9283. Top recommendation is iPhone 15 I just bought.

This is in the Search Discovery Service, recommendation module. Production environment, Account: company-shop-prod, Project: REC-FILTER-01.

Chrome 120 on Windows 11, timestamp 2026-02-06 13:45:33 PST. Happens for all recently purchased items.

Customers call support asking why we recommend items they own. Makes system look broken and reduces trust.

We show recommendations to 50,000 users daily. Click-through rate dropped 40% last month because recommendations aren't relevant.

This should be fixed to exclude purchased items and suggest complementary products instead.

1524.title: Revenue report $1.2M but bank deposits $1.0M - refunds in wrong month
1524.description:
Issue with revenue reporting. Monthly revenue report for January shows $1.2M but bank deposits only total $1.0M. Accounting can't reconcile $200k difference.

Investigated and found refunds processed in January for December sales are being subtracted from January revenue instead of adjusting December.

Viewed report at https://analytics.company.internal/financial/revenue for January 2026. Refunds in wrong month causing $200k shift.

This is in the Analytics Reporting Service, financial module, revenue calculation. Production environment, Account: company-analytics-prod, Project: FIN-REV-01.

Chrome 119 on macOS 14.1, timestamp 2026-02-06 09:50:15 PST. Affects all months with refunds from previous months.

Auditors flagged this as material misstatement. May need to refile financials for 18 months. Affects investor confidence.

We process 500 refunds monthly averaging $400 each. Timing difference affects monthly revenue by $50k-$200k.

This is urgent - audit next week and need accurate monthly figures. CFO notified.

1525.title: Logged out at exactly 14:30:00 when session expires at 14:30:00
1525.description:
Issue with session timeout. Getting logged out at exactly 14:30:00 when session expires at 14:30:00. Should be valid through that second.

Timeout is 30 minutes but kicked out at 29:59 because comparison uses >= instead of >.

Working at https://portal.company.internal/dashboard when logged out at 2026-02-06 14:30:00 PST, exactly at expiry time.

This is in the Security Compliance Service, authentication module, token validation. Production environment, Account: company-auth-prod, Project: AUTH-EXP-01.

Firefox 121 on Ubuntu 22.04, timestamp 2026-02-06 14:30:00 PST. Happens to all users at exact expiry.

Users lose work when logged out 1 second early. Particularly frustrating during form submissions.

We have 5,000 active users daily with 2-3 expirations each. Early logout causes 200-300 complaints weekly about lost work.

This should be fixed so tokens valid through expiry second, not expire at it.

1526.title: Encryption strength shows 258 instead of 2^256
1526.description:
Issue with security metrics. Encryption key strength shows 258 for 256-bit key when should show something like 2^256.

Calculation is adding 2 + 256 = 258 instead of calculating 2^256. Makes encryption look weak.

Viewed security dashboard at https://security.company.internal/encryption. Key strength for 256-bit keys shows as 258.

This is in the Security Compliance Service, encryption module, strength calculation. Production environment, Account: company-security-prod, Project: ENC-STR-01.

Chrome 120 on Windows 11, timestamp 2026-02-06 11:15:15 CET. Affects all encryption strength displays.

Security auditors questioned why key strength so low. Had to explain it's display bug. Looks bad in compliance reports.

We show metrics to 50 security administrators and auditors. Incorrect display undermines confidence in security.

This should be fixed to show 2^256 or normalized score, not raw addition.

1527.title: Admin denied access to reports while regular users can access
1527.description:
Issue with permission checking. Admin account can't access reports page but regular user account can. Permission check seems backwards.

Admin account (admin@company.com) gets 'Access Denied' but regular account (user@company.com) works fine.

Attempted access to https://reports.company.internal/dashboard with admin credentials. Got denied. Regular user account worked.

This is in the Security Compliance Service, authorization module, permission check. Production environment, Account: company-auth-prod, Project: AUTH-PERM-01.

Chrome 119 on macOS 14.2, timestamp 2026-02-06 13:00:47 PST. Affects all admin users.

Our 20 admin users can't perform duties. They log in with regular accounts for basic tasks, then switch to admin for admin tasks. Major security issue.

Admins need access to everything regular users can access plus admin functions. Inverted check blocks legitimate access.

This is urgent - admins can't manage system. Permission logic needs immediate fix.

1528.title: Inventory valuation using LIFO when policy requires FIFO
1528.description:
Issue with inventory accounting. Valuation report uses LIFO (Last In First Out) but accounting policy requires FIFO (First In First Out).

When we sell items, system takes cost from most recent inventory instead of oldest. Violates accounting standards and could cause audit issues.

Viewed inventory valuation at https://inventory.company.internal/valuation for WH-MAIN-01. Shows LIFO but should be FIFO.

This is in the Inventory Warehouse Service, inventory module, valuation. Production environment, Account: company-inventory-prod, Project: INV-VAL-01.

Chrome 120 on Windows 11, timestamp 2026-02-06 14:45:33 EST. Affects all valuation reports.

Financial statements incorrect because of wrong costing method. Difference between LIFO and FIFO valuation is ~$50,000 for current inventory. Could trigger audit finding.

We value inventory monthly for financial reporting. Wrong method used for 3 months. May need to restate quarterly financials.

This needs immediate fix and historical correction. CFO and external auditors notified.

1529.title: Picking efficiency backwards - fast pickers show low score
1529.description:
Issue with warehouse performance metrics. Efficiency report shows higher efficiency for slower pickers and lower for faster ones.

Best picker (50 picks/hour) shows 50% efficiency. Slow picker (25 picks/hour) shows 100% efficiency. Doesn't make sense.

Viewed efficiency report at https://warehouse.company.internal/performance for WH-MAIN-02. Calculation appears backwards.

This is in the Inventory Warehouse Service, warehouse module, efficiency. Production environment, Account: company-warehouse-prod, Project: WH-EFF-01.

Firefox 121 on Ubuntu 22.04, timestamp 2026-02-06 09:15:18 PST. Affects all picking reports.

We use these for performance reviews and bonuses. Best workers show low efficiency and get smaller bonuses. Causing morale issues.

We have 50 pickers across 5 facilities. Inverted metric affected 2 months of reviews. May need to recalculate bonuses.

This is urgent - need to fix and correct historical metrics. HR notified.

1530.description:
Issue with lead time calculations. Order estimates include weekends even though suppliers don't work weekends.

Ordered Friday needing 5 business days. System shows Wednesday delivery (7 calendar days) but supplier confirms Thursday (5 business days).

Placed order PO-2024-5829 at https://supply.company.internal/orders on Friday Feb 2. System estimated Feb 9 (Wed), supplier confirmed Feb 10 (Thu).

This is in the Inventory Warehouse Service, supply module, lead time. Production environment, Account: company-supply-prod, Project: SUPPLY-LEAD-01.

Chrome 119 on Windows 11, timestamp 2026-02-06 10:00:47 PST. Affects all lead times.

Production planning relies on accurate lead times. Late materials delay production and customer deliveries. 3 delays this month.

We place 200 POs weekly. Incorrect lead times affect 40% (spanning weekends). Causes planning issues.

This should be fixed for accurate planning. Lead times should count business days only.

1531.title: Data sync creates duplicate customer records on conflicts
1531.description:
Issue with data synchronization. When there's conflict, system creates duplicate records instead of resolving to one version.

Updated customer CUST-8472 offline. When synced, server had different update. Now two records for same customer.

Synced at https://sync.company.internal/data after editing CUST-8472. Conflict created duplicate instead of merging.

This is in the Integration API Service, data sync module, conflict resolution. Production environment, Account: company-sync-prod, Project: SYNC-CONF-01.

Chrome 120 on macOS 14.1, timestamp 2026-02-06 10:45:33 PST. Happens with all conflicts.

Database has hundreds of duplicates from conflicts. Customer service confused seeing multiple records. Data quality degrading.

We have 500 users syncing daily. 5% have conflicts. That's 25 duplicates/day or 500+/month.

This needs urgent fix. Need proper conflict resolution and cleanup of duplicates.

1532.title: Webhook retries too fast causing rate limit blocks
1532.description:
Issue with webhook retry logic. Failed webhooks retry too quickly and hit recipient's rate limit.

Retries happen at 1s, 2s, 3s intervals. Should be exponential: 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s to avoid rate limits.

Sent webhook HOOK-9284 at https://webhooks.company.internal/send. After failure, retries at 1s, 2s, 3s got rate limited.

This is in the Integration API Service, webhooks module, retry logic. Production environment, Account: company-webhooks-prod, Project: HOOK-RETRY-01.

Firefox 121 on Windows 11, timestamp 2026-02-06 13:40:22 CET. Affects all failed webhooks.

Webhooks blocked by recipients due to rapid retries. Losing important notifications. Recipients blocking our IPs.

We send 10,000 webhooks daily with 5% failure. That's 500 failed webhooks retrying too aggressively.

This needs fix for proper exponential backoff. Retries should space out to avoid limits.

1533.description:
Issue with GraphQL complexity limits. Simple query with depth 5 and 3 fields shows complexity 15 and gets blocked.

Complexity calculation multiplies depth × breadth when should add them. Makes simple queries appear complex.

Tried query at https://api.company.internal/graphql for user profile with 5 levels, 3 fields/level. Complexity: 15, limit: 10, rejected.

This is in the Integration API Service, GraphQL module, complexity. Production environment, Account: company-graphql-prod, Project: GQL-COMP-01.

Chrome 119 on macOS 14.2, timestamp 2026-02-06 12:00:33 PST. Affects all nested queries.

Mobile app can't load profiles because queries too complex. Users see errors instead of data. App ratings dropping.

We serve 100,000 GraphQL queries daily. 30% rejected as too complex when they're reasonable.

This needs immediate fix. Complexity should be additive, not multiplicative.

1534.title: OAuth tokens expire in 1 minute instead of 60 minutes
1534.description:
Issue with OAuth token lifetime. Access tokens expire after 1 minute when configured for 60 minutes. Users constantly logged out.

Token lifetime configured as 60 minutes but tokens expire after 60 seconds. System treating minutes as seconds.

Logged in at https://auth.company.internal/oauth and got logged out after 1 minute. Token shows expiry_time = current_time + 60 but in seconds.

This is in the Integration API Service, third party module, OAuth. Production environment, Account: company-oauth-prod, Project: OAUTH-TOKEN-01.

Safari 17 on iOS 17.2, timestamp 2026-02-06 12:30:47 PST. Affects all OAuth tokens.

Users constantly logged out and re-authenticating. Mobile users particularly affected losing session every minute. Complaints up 500%.

We issue 50,000 OAuth tokens daily. All expire 60x too fast. Massive user frustration and support load.

This is critical - users can barely use system. Token lifetime needs fix to use minutes not seconds.

1535.title: API allows 200 requests in 1 minute at hour boundary
1535.description:
Issue with API rate limiting. Users can send 100 requests at 2:59pm and 100 at 3:00pm, getting 200 in 1 minute when limit is 100/hour.

Rate limit resets at fixed times instead of sliding window. Users burst 200 requests around hour boundary.

Sent 100 requests at https://api.company.internal/v1/data at 2:59pm, then 100 at 3:00pm. All 200 accepted despite 100/hour limit.

This is in the Integration API Service, REST API module, rate limiting. Production environment, Account: company-api-prod, Project: API-RATE-01.

Chrome 120 on Windows 11, timestamp 2026-02-06 14:59:00 to 15:00:30 PST. Affects all rate-limited endpoints.

API servers overloaded during hour boundaries when users exploit this. Response times spike every hour.

We have 10,000 API users. 5% exploit this pattern. That's 500 users sending 2x traffic every hour.

This needs fix to use sliding window. Rate limits should be based on last 60 minutes, not clock hour.

1536.description:
Issue with inventory availability. System shows 100 units available but when try to order 60, says only 50 available.

Available quantity shows on-hand minus reserved, but doesn't subtract pending orders not yet reserved. Causes overselling.

Tried to order SKU-7392 quantity 60 at https://orders.company.internal/create. Showed 100 available but rejected saying only 50.

This is in the Order Management Service, inventory module, availability. Production environment, Account: company-orders-prod, Project: ORD-INV-01.

Firefox 121 on Ubuntu 22.04, timestamp 2026-02-06 09:45:33 PST. Affects all availability checks.

Customers frustrated seeing items in stock but can't order. Losing sales because availability display misleading.

We process 1,000 orders daily. 10% encounter this issue. That's 100 failed orders per day.

This needs fix to show true availability. Calculation should subtract both reserved and pending.

Issue with sales tax calculation. Being charged wrong tax rate because system uses billing address instead of shipping address.

I live in Oregon (no tax) shipping to California (9.5% tax). Order shows 0% tax when should be 9.5% for delivery location.

Placed order ORD-2024-7392 at https://orders.company.internal/checkout shipping to CA. Tax calculated as 0% based on OR billing.

This is in the Order Management Service, order processing module, tax. Production environment, Account: company-orders-prod, Project: ORD-TAX-01.

Chrome 119 on macOS 14.1, timestamp 2026-02-06 11:00:33 PST. Affects all orders with different billing/shipping states.

We're under-collecting sales tax on interstate orders. Could result in audit issues and penalties. May owe back taxes plus interest.

We process 500 orders daily with 20% shipping to different state. That's 100 orders/day with wrong tax.

This is urgent - need to fix tax calculation and may need corrected invoices. Tax compliance notified.

1538.title: Payment authorization expired after 7 hours instead of 7 days
1538.description:
Issue with payment authorization hold. Credit card authorizations expire after 7 hours when should last 7 days. Orders fail when try to capture.

Customer places order, we authorize card. By shipping time (2-3 days), authorization expired and can't capture payment.

Order ORD-2024-8473 placed at https://orders.company.internal/checkout. Authorization expired after 7 hours, couldn't capture when shipping 2 days later.

This is in the Order Management Service, payment module, authorization. Production environment, Account: company-payment-prod, Project: PAY-AUTH-01.

Safari 17 on iOS 17.2, timestamp 2026-02-06 08:45:47 PST. Affects all authorizations.

Losing orders because can't capture payment. Customers charged, authorization expires, we ship, then can't collect. Have to contact for new payment.

We process 200 orders daily with 2-3 day shipping. 80% of authorizations expire before shipping. That's 160 failed captures/day.

This is critical - losing revenue and satisfaction. Authorization hold needs extension to 7 days.

1539.description:
Issue with SLA compliance tracking. Ticket opened Friday 4pm with 24-hour SLA, resolved Monday 2pm. System marks as SLA violation.

System counts weekend time when shouldn't. 24 business hours from Friday 4pm is Tuesday 4pm, not Saturday 4pm.

Ticket TICK-8473 at https://support.company.internal/tickets/TICK-8473 opened Friday 4pm, resolved Monday 2pm. Marked violated despite being within 24 business hours.

This is in the Order Management Service, customer service module, SLA tracking. Production environment, Account: company-support-prod, Project: SUPP-SLA-01.

Chrome 120 on Windows 11, timestamp 2026-02-06 12:40:22 CET. Affects all tickets opened near weekends.

Support team's SLA metrics wrong. They're penalized for weekend time they don't work. Affects performance reviews and bonuses.

We handle 500 tickets weekly. 30% opened Thursday-Friday. That's 150 tickets/week incorrectly marked as violations.

This needs fix to count business hours only. Team morale suffering from unfair violations.

1540.description:

System treats grams as kilograms without converting. 5000g entered, system calculates for 5000kg.

Created shipment SHIP-7392 at https://shipping.company.internal/create for 5000g (5kg) package. Shipping cost calculated for 5000kg.

This is in the Order Management Service, shipping module, weight calculation. Production environment, Account: company-shipping-prod, Project: SHIP-WEIGHT-01.

Firefox 121 on Ubuntu 22.04, timestamp 2026-02-06 14:00:33 PST. Affects all shipments with weight in grams.

Customers seeing $500 shipping for small packages that should cost $5. Orders abandoned at checkout due to ridiculous fees.

We ship 1,000 packages daily. 40% have weights in grams. That's 400 shipments/day with 1000x inflated costs.

This is critical - losing sales due to incorrect shipping. Weight unit conversion needs immediate fix.

Transaction at https://cards.company.internal/accounts/withdraw for $15 from account with $110 balance. Approved even though final $95 is below $100 minimum.

Chrome 119 on macOS 14.2, timestamp 2026-02-06 09:30:47 PST. Affects all accounts with minimum balance requirements.

Customers incurring minimum balance fees because system allows violating transactions. Causes unexpected fees and complaints.

This needs fix to properly enforce minimum. Transactions should be declined if would bring balance below minimum.

1542.description:

System doesn't validate that refund amount can't exceed original payment. Major financial control issue.

Processed refund at https://refunds.company.internal/process for order ORD-8473. Original payment $100, refund $150, no error.

This is in the Card Management Service, payment refund module, amount validation. Production environment, Account: company-refunds-prod, Project: REF-VAL-01.

Safari 17 on iOS 17.2, timestamp 2026-02-06 10:45:33 PST. Affects all refund processing.

We're losing money on refunds exceeding original payments. Could be exploited for fraud. Audit will flag this as critical control deficiency.

We process 200 refunds daily. Even 1% error rate means 2 overpayments/day or 60/month.

This is critical - financial controls broken. Refund validation needs immediate implementation to prevent overpayments.

Transaction comparison at https://transactions.company.internal/match comparing USD and EUR amounts without conversion.

Chrome 120 on Windows 11, timestamp 2026-02-06 12:00:47 CET. Affects all multi-currency transactions.

1544.description:

Dispute DISP-8473 at https://disputes.company.internal/view/DISP-8473 shows deadline Feb 4. Filed Jan 25, notified Feb 1, should be Feb 11.

Firefox 121 on Ubuntu 22.04, timestamp 2026-02-06 12:35:15 PST. Affects all dispute deadlines.

Chrome 119 on macOS 14.1, timestamp 2026-02-06 14:05:22 PST. Affects all cards in their expiry month.

Safari 17 on iOS 17.2, timestamp 2026-02-06 14:45:47 PST. Affects all transfer fee calculations.

1547.description:

Chrome 120 on Windows 11, timestamp 2026-02-06 08:00:22 EST. Affects all tracking displays.

Customers confused calling support thinking packages lost at sea. Damages trust in tracking system.

We have 5,000 active shipments tracked daily. All show wrong locations. Support overwhelmed with tracking questions.

This needs immediate fix. Coordinate order needs correction for proper map display.

1548.description:

Sensor outputs Celsius but system displays as Fahrenheit without converting. Causing climate control to malfunction.

Viewing warehouse WH-COLD-05 at https://warehouse.company.internal/climate shows 2°F. Physical thermometer reads 2°C (36°F).

Firefox 121 on Ubuntu 22.04, timestamp 2026-02-06 06:30:15 PST. Started after sensor firmware update last week.

HVAC system trying to heat warehouse because thinks it's freezing. Could damage temperature-sensitive products.

1550.title: SMS with emoji charged for 2 segments when showing 1
1550.description:
Issue with SMS character counting. Sent message with emoji showing 58 characters (under 160 limit) but charged for 2 SMS segments.

Message 'Hello! 👋 Your package arrives today 📦' shows as 58 characters but emoji count as 2 characters each in SMS encoding.

Sent SMS at https://notifications.company.internal/sms/send. Character counter showed 58/160 but carrier billed for 2 segments ($0.02 instead of $0.01).

Chrome 119 on Windows 11, timestamp 2026-02-06 10:35:22 CET. Affects all SMS with emoji.

Our SMS costs are 50% higher than budgeted. We send 10,000 SMS daily with 30% containing emoji. Wrong counting costs us $15/day or $450/month.

Customers surprised by costs and we can't budget accurately. Character counter needs to match actual SMS encoding.

This should be fixed soon to control costs and provide accurate estimates.

1551.description:
Issue with late fees. $1,000 invoice 2 months overdue shows $102.50 in late fees when should be $100 (5% × $1,000 × 2).

Contract specifies simple interest but calculation seems to use compound interest. After 2 months: $1,000 × 1.05² - $1,000 = $102.50.

This is in the Payment Billing Service, invoice module, late fee calculation. Production environment, Account: company-billing-prod, Project: INV-FEE-01.

Safari 17 on macOS 14.1, timestamp 2026-02-06 08:45:47 EST. Affects all multi-month overdue invoices.

Customers complaining about excessive fees. Some threaten legal action saying we're breaching contract by using compound interest.

We have 200 overdue invoices. Wrong calculation overcharges customers by 2-5% on late fees. Could be contract breach.

This is urgent - need to fix calculation and may need to issue credits. Legal notified.

1552.title: Recommending iPhone I bought yesterday
1552.description:
Issue with product recommendations. Bought iPhone 15 yesterday and today homepage recommending I buy another iPhone 15.

Recommendations should filter out items I already own and suggest accessories or related products instead.

Viewed recommendations at https://shop.company.internal after purchasing order ORD-2024-9283. Top recommendation is iPhone 15 I just bought.

This is in the Search Discovery Service, recommendation module. Production environment, Account: company-shop-prod, Project: REC-FILTER-01.

Chrome 120 on Windows 11, timestamp 2026-02-06 13:30:33 PST. Happens for all recently purchased items.

Customers call support asking why we recommend items they own. Makes system look broken and reduces trust.

We show recommendations to 50,000 users daily. Click-through rate dropped 40% last month because recommendations aren't relevant.

This should be fixed to exclude purchased items and suggest complementary products instead.

1553.title: Revenue $1.2M but bank has $1.0M - refunds in wrong month
1553.description:
Issue with revenue reporting. Monthly revenue report for January shows $1.2M but bank deposits only total $1.0M. Accounting can't reconcile $200k difference.

Investigated and found refunds processed in January for December sales are being subtracted from January revenue instead of adjusting December.

Viewed report at https://analytics.company.internal/financial/revenue for January 2026. Refunds in wrong month causing $200k shift.

This is in the Analytics Reporting Service, financial module, revenue calculation. Production environment, Account: company-analytics-prod, Project: FIN-REV-01.

Chrome 119 on macOS 14.1, timestamp 2026-02-06 09:35:15 PST. Affects all months with refunds from previous months.

Auditors flagged this as material misstatement. May need to refile financials for 18 months. Affects investor confidence.

We process 500 refunds monthly averaging $400 each. Timing difference affects monthly revenue by $50k-$200k.

This is urgent - audit next week and need accurate monthly figures. CFO notified.

1554.title: Logged out at 14:30:00 when session expires at 14:30:00
1554.description:
Issue with session timeout. Getting logged out at exactly 14:30:00 when session expires at 14:30:00. Should be valid through that second.

Timeout is 30 minutes but kicked out at 29:59 because comparison uses >= instead of >.

Working at https://portal.company.internal/dashboard when logged out at 2026-02-06 14:30:00 PST, exactly at expiry time.

This is in the Security Compliance Service, authentication module, token validation. Production environment, Account: company-auth-prod, Project: AUTH-EXP-01.

Firefox 121 on Ubuntu 22.04, timestamp 2026-02-06 14:30:00 PST. Happens to all users at exact expiry.

Users lose work when logged out 1 second early. Particularly frustrating during form submissions.

We have 5,000 active users daily with 2-3 expirations each. Early logout causes 200-300 complaints weekly about lost work.

This should be fixed so tokens valid through expiry second, not expire at it.

1555.title: Encryption strength 258 instead of 2^256
1555.description:
Issue with security metrics. Encryption key strength shows 258 for 256-bit key when should show something like 2^256.

Calculation is adding 2 + 256 = 258 instead of calculating 2^256. Makes encryption look weak.

Viewed security dashboard at https://security.company.internal/encryption. Key strength for 256-bit keys shows as 258.

This is in the Security Compliance Service, encryption module, strength calculation. Production environment, Account: company-security-prod, Project: ENC-STR-01.

Chrome 120 on Windows 11, timestamp 2026-02-06 11:00:15 CET. Affects all encryption strength displays.

Security auditors questioned why key strength so low. Had to explain it's display bug. Looks bad in compliance reports.

We show metrics to 50 security administrators and auditors. Incorrect display undermines confidence in security.

This should be fixed to show 2^256 or normalized score, not raw addition.

1556.title: Admin denied reports access while users granted
1556.description:
Issue with permission checking. Admin account can't access reports page but regular user account can. Permission check seems backwards.

Admin account (admin@company.com) gets 'Access Denied' but regular account (user@company.com) works fine.

Attempted access to https://reports.company.internal/dashboard with admin credentials. Got denied. Regular user account worked.

This is in the Security Compliance Service, authorization module, permission check. Production environment, Account: company-auth-prod, Project: AUTH-PERM-01.

Chrome 119 on macOS 14.2, timestamp 2026-02-06 12:45:47 PST. Affects all admin users.

Our 20 admin users can't perform duties. They log in with regular accounts for basic tasks, then switch to admin for admin tasks. Major security issue.

Admins need access to everything regular users can access plus admin functions. Inverted check blocks legitimate access.

This is urgent - admins can't manage system. Permission logic needs immediate fix.

1557.title: Inventory using LIFO when policy requires FIFO
1557.description:
Issue with inventory accounting. Valuation report uses LIFO (Last In First Out) but accounting policy requires FIFO (First In First Out).

When we sell items, system takes cost from most recent inventory instead of oldest. Violates accounting standards and could cause audit issues.

Viewed inventory valuation at https://inventory.company.internal/valuation for WH-MAIN-01. Shows LIFO but should be FIFO.

This is in the Inventory Warehouse Service, inventory module, valuation. Production environment, Account: company-inventory-prod, Project: INV-VAL-01.

Chrome 120 on Windows 11, timestamp 2026-02-06 14:30:33 EST. Affects all valuation reports.

Financial statements incorrect because of wrong costing method. Difference between LIFO and FIFO valuation is ~$50,000 for current inventory. Could trigger audit finding.

We value inventory monthly for financial reporting. Wrong method used for 3 months. May need to restate quarterly financials.

This needs immediate fix and historical correction. CFO and external auditors notified.

1558.title: Picking efficiency backwards - fast pickers low score
1558.description:
Issue with warehouse performance metrics. Efficiency report shows higher efficiency for slower pickers and lower for faster ones.

Best picker (50 picks/hour) shows 50% efficiency. Slow picker (25 picks/hour) shows 100% efficiency. Doesn't make sense.

Viewed efficiency report at https://warehouse.company.internal/performance for WH-MAIN-02. Calculation appears backwards.

This is in the Inventory Warehouse Service, warehouse module, efficiency. Production environment, Account: company-warehouse-prod, Project: WH-EFF-01.

Firefox 121 on Ubuntu 22.04, timestamp 2026-02-06 09:00:18 PST. Affects all picking reports.

We use these for performance reviews and bonuses. Best workers show low efficiency and get smaller bonuses. Causing morale issues.

We have 50 pickers across 5 facilities. Inverted metric affected 2 months of reviews. May need to recalculate bonuses.

This is urgent - need to fix and correct historical metrics. HR notified.

1559.title: Lead time includes weekends when supplier closed
1559.description:
Issue with lead time calculations. Order estimates include weekends even though suppliers don't work weekends.

Ordered Friday needing 5 business days. System shows Wednesday delivery (7 calendar days) but supplier confirms Thursday (5 business days).

Placed order PO-2024-5829 at https://supply.company.internal/orders on Friday Feb 2. System estimated Feb 9 (Wed), supplier confirmed Feb 10 (Thu).

This is in the Inventory Warehouse Service, supply module, lead time. Production environment, Account: company-supply-prod, Project: SUPPLY-LEAD-01.

Chrome 119 on Windows 11, timestamp 2026-02-06 09:45:47 PST. Affects all lead times.

Production planning relies on accurate lead times. Late materials delay production and customer deliveries. 3 delays this month.

We place 200 POs weekly. Incorrect lead times affect 40% (spanning weekends). Causes planning issues.

This should be fixed for accurate planning. Lead times should count business days only.

1560.title: Sync creates duplicate customer records
1560.description:
Issue with data synchronization. When there's conflict, system creates duplicate records instead of resolving to one version.

Updated customer CUST-8472 offline. When synced, server had different update. Now two records for same customer.

Synced at https://sync.company.internal/data after editing CUST-8472. Conflict created duplicate instead of merging.

This is in the Integration API Service, data sync module, conflict resolution. Production environment, Account: company-sync-prod, Project: SYNC-CONF-01.

Chrome 120 on macOS 14.1, timestamp 2026-02-06 10:30:33 PST. Happens with all conflicts.

Database has hundreds of duplicates from conflicts. Customer service confused seeing multiple records. Data quality degrading.

We have 500 users syncing daily. 5% have conflicts. That's 25 duplicates/day or 500+/month.

This needs urgent fix. Need proper conflict resolution and cleanup of duplicates.

1561.title: Webhook retries cause rate limit blocks
1561.description:
Issue with webhook retry logic. Failed webhooks retry too quickly and hit recipient's rate limit.

Retries happen at 1s, 2s, 3s intervals. Should be exponential: 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s to avoid rate limits.

Sent webhook HOOK-9284 at https://webhooks.company.internal/send. After failure, retries at 1s, 2s, 3s got rate limited.

This is in the Integration API Service, webhooks module, retry logic. Production environment, Account: company-webhooks-prod, Project: HOOK-RETRY-01.

Firefox 121 on Windows 11, timestamp 2026-02-06 13:25:22 CET. Affects all failed webhooks.

Webhooks blocked by recipients due to rapid retries. Losing important notifications. Recipients blocking our IPs.

We send 10,000 webhooks daily with 5% failure. That's 500 failed webhooks retrying too aggressively.

This needs fix for proper exponential backoff. Retries should space out to avoid limits.

1562.title: GraphQL query complexity 15 rejected when limit 10
1562.description:
Issue with GraphQL complexity limits. Simple query with depth 5 and 3 fields shows complexity 15 and gets blocked.

Complexity calculation multiplies depth × breadth when should add them. Makes simple queries appear complex.

Tried query at https://api.company.internal/graphql for user profile with 5 levels, 3 fields/level. Complexity: 15, limit: 10, rejected.

This is in the Integration API Service, GraphQL module, complexity. Production environment, Account: company-graphql-prod, Project: GQL-COMP-01.

Chrome 119 on macOS 14.2, timestamp 2026-02-06 11:45:33 PST. Affects all nested queries.

Mobile app can't load profiles because queries too complex. Users see errors instead of data. App ratings dropping.

We serve 100,000 GraphQL queries daily. 30% rejected as too complex when they're reasonable.

This needs immediate fix. Complexity should be additive, not multiplicative.

1563.title: OAuth tokens expire in 1 minute not 60 minutes
1563.description:
Issue with OAuth token lifetime. Access tokens expire after 1 minute when configured for 60 minutes. Users constantly logged out.

Token lifetime configured as 60 minutes but tokens expire after 60 seconds. System treating minutes as seconds.

Logged in at https://auth.company.internal/oauth and got logged out after 1 minute. Token shows expiry_time = current_time + 60 but in seconds.

This is in the Integration API Service, third party module, OAuth. Production environment, Account: company-oauth-prod, Project: OAUTH-TOKEN-01.

Safari 17 on iOS 17.2, timestamp 2026-02-06 12:15:47 PST. Affects all OAuth tokens.

Users constantly logged out and re-authenticating. Mobile users particularly affected losing session every minute. Complaints up 500%.

We issue 50,000 OAuth tokens daily. All expire 60x too fast. Massive user frustration and support load.

This is critical - users can barely use system. Token lifetime needs fix to use minutes not seconds.

1564.title: API rate limit allows 200 requests in 1 minute
1564.description:
Issue with API rate limiting. Users can send 100 requests at 2:59pm and 100 at 3:00pm, getting 200 in 1 minute when limit is 100/hour.

Rate limit resets at fixed times instead of sliding window. Users burst 200 requests around hour boundary.

Sent 100 requests at https://api.company.internal/v1/data at 2:59pm, then 100 at 3:00pm. All 200 accepted despite 100/hour limit.

This is in the Integration API Service, REST API module, rate limiting. Production environment, Account: company-api-prod, Project: API-RATE-01.

Chrome 120 on Windows 11, timestamp 2026-02-06 14:59:00 to 15:00:30 PST. Affects all rate-limited endpoints.

API servers overloaded during hour boundaries when users exploit this. Response times spike every hour.

We have 10,000 API users. 5% exploit this pattern. That's 500 users sending 2x traffic every hour.

This needs fix to use sliding window. Rate limits should be based on last 60 minutes, not clock hour.

1565.title: Shows 100 available but only 50 can be ordered
1565.description:
Issue with inventory availability. System shows 100 units available but when try to order 60, says only 50 available.

Available quantity shows on-hand minus reserved, but doesn't subtract pending orders not yet reserved. Causes overselling.

Tried to order SKU-7392 quantity 60 at https://orders.company.internal/create. Showed 100 available but rejected saying only 50.

This is in the Order Management Service, inventory module, availability. Production environment, Account: company-orders-prod, Project: ORD-INV-01.

Firefox 121 on Ubuntu 22.04, timestamp 2026-02-06 09:30:33 PST. Affects all availability checks.

Customers frustrated seeing items in stock but can't order. Losing sales because availability display misleading.

We process 1,000 orders daily. 10% encounter this issue. That's 100 failed orders per day.

This needs fix to show true availability. Calculation should subtract both reserved and pending.

1566.title: Tax 0% shipping to CA from OR billing address
1566.description:
Issue with sales tax calculation. Being charged wrong tax rate because system uses billing address instead of shipping address.

I live in Oregon (no tax) shipping to California (9.5% tax). Order shows 0% tax when should be 9.5% for delivery location.

Placed order ORD-2024-7392 at https://orders.company.internal/checkout shipping to CA. Tax calculated as 0% based on OR billing.

This is in the Order Management Service, order processing module, tax. Production environment, Account: company-orders-prod, Project: ORD-TAX-01.

Chrome 119 on macOS 14.1, timestamp 2026-02-06 10:45:33 PST. Affects all orders with different billing/shipping states.

We're under-collecting sales tax on interstate orders. Could result in audit issues and penalties. May owe back taxes plus interest.

We process 500 orders daily with 20% shipping to different state. That's 100 orders/day with wrong tax.

This is urgent - need to fix tax calculation and may need corrected invoices. Tax compliance notified.

1567.title: Authorization expired after 7 hours not 7 days
1567.description:
Issue with payment authorization hold. Credit card authorizations expire after 7 hours when should last 7 days. Orders fail when try to capture.

Customer places order, we authorize card. By shipping time (2-3 days), authorization expired and can't capture payment.

Order ORD-2024-8473 placed at https://orders.company.internal/checkout. Authorization expired after 7 hours, couldn't capture when shipping 2 days later.

This is in the Order Management Service, payment module, authorization. Production environment, Account: company-payment-prod, Project: PAY-AUTH-01.

Safari 17 on iOS 17.2, timestamp 2026-02-06 08:30:47 PST. Affects all authorizations.

Losing orders because can't capture payment. Customers charged, authorization expires, we ship, then can't collect. Have to contact for new payment.

We process 200 orders daily with 2-3 day shipping. 80% of authorizations expire before shipping. That's 160 failed captures/day.

This is critical - losing revenue and satisfaction. Authorization hold needs extension to 7 days.

1568.title: SLA violation despite resolving in 6 business hours
1568.description:
Issue with SLA compliance tracking. Ticket opened Friday 4pm with 24-hour SLA, resolved Monday 2pm. System marks as SLA violation.

System counts weekend time when shouldn't. 24 business hours from Friday 4pm is Tuesday 4pm, not Saturday 4pm.

Ticket TICK-8473 at https://support.company.internal/tickets/TICK-8473 opened Friday 4pm, resolved Monday 2pm. Marked violated despite being within 24 business hours.

This is in the Order Management Service, customer service module, SLA tracking. Production environment, Account: company-support-prod, Project: SUPP-SLA-01.

Chrome 120 on Windows 11, timestamp 2026-02-06 12:25:22 CET. Affects all tickets opened near weekends.

Support team's SLA metrics wrong. They're penalized for weekend time they don't work. Affects performance reviews and bonuses.

We handle 500 tickets weekly. 30% opened Thursday-Friday. That's 150 tickets/week incorrectly marked as violations.

This needs fix to count business hours only. Team morale suffering from unfair violations.

1569.title: Shipping $500 for 5kg package
1569.description:
Issue with shipping calculations. 5kg package charged for 5000kg shipping. Costs are $500 when should be $5.

System treats grams as kilograms without converting. 5000g entered, system calculates for 5000kg.

Created shipment SHIP-7392 at https://shipping.company.internal/create for 5000g (5kg) package. Shipping cost calculated for 5000kg.

This is in the Order Management Service, shipping module, weight calculation. Production environment, Account: company-shipping-prod, Project: SHIP-WEIGHT-01.

Firefox 121 on Ubuntu 22.04, timestamp 2026-02-06 13:45:33 PST. Affects all shipments with weight in grams.

Customers seeing $500 shipping for small packages that should cost $5. Orders abandoned at checkout due to ridiculous fees.

We ship 1,000 packages daily. 40% have weights in grams. That's 400 shipments/day with 1000x inflated costs.

This is critical - losing sales due to incorrect shipping. Weight unit conversion needs immediate fix.

1570.title: Report export timing out for large datasets
1570.description:
Issue with report generation. When I try to export a report with more than 10,000 records, the request times out after 30 seconds.

I need to export our monthly sales report which has about 25,000 transactions. The export starts but never completes - just shows a timeout error.

Attempted export at https://reports.company.internal/sales/export?month=2026-01 with 25,000 records. Request timed out after 30 seconds.

This is in the Analytics Reporting Service, export module. Production environment, Account: company-reports-prod, Project: REPORT-EXPORT-01.

Chrome 120 on Windows 11, timestamp 2026-02-06 16:45:22 CET. Affects all large report exports.

End-of-month reporting is blocked. Finance team can't get the data they need for monthly close. We're already 2 days behind schedule.

We need to export 5-10 large reports monthly for financial reporting. All are failing. This is blocking our month-end close process.

This is urgent - we have regulatory deadlines for financial reporting. Need solution to export large datasets.

1571.title: Search results missing recent items added today
1571.description:
Issue with search functionality. Items I added to the catalog this morning aren't showing up in search results.

Added 15 new products at 9am. It's now 3pm and they still don't appear when I search for them by name or SKU. I can see them if I navigate directly to the product page.

Searching at https://catalog.company.internal/search?q=NewProduct2024 returns no results even though product exists with that exact name.

This is in the Search Discovery Service, indexing module. Production environment, Account: company-search-prod, Project: SEARCH-INDEX-01.

Firefox 121 on Ubuntu 22.04, timestamp 2026-02-06 15:00:15 PST. Affects all newly added items.

Customers can't find new products we just launched. Marketing sent out email campaign at noon promoting these items, but customers searching for them find nothing.

We add 50-100 new products weekly. If they're not searchable for hours, we lose sales during the critical launch window.

This needs immediate fix. New products should be searchable within minutes of being added, not hours later.

1572.title: File upload fails with error but file actually uploaded
1572.description:
Issue with file upload. When I upload a document, I get an error message saying upload failed, but when I check, the file is actually there.

Uploaded contract document CONTRACT-2024-847.pdf. Got error "Upload failed, please try again". Checked document library and the file is there with correct content.

Uploading at https://documents.company.internal/upload. Error displayed but file appears in https://documents.company.internal/library.

This is in the Integration API Service, file upload module. Production environment, Account: company-docs-prod, Project: DOC-UPLOAD-01.

Safari 17 on macOS 14.2, timestamp 2026-02-06 14:20:47 PST. Happens with all file uploads.

Users are uploading files multiple times because they think it failed. We're getting duplicate files - same document uploaded 3-4 times by same user.

We receive 500 file uploads daily. About 30% get the false error and 50% of those users retry, creating 75 duplicate files per day.

This needs fix to show correct success message when upload completes. Users shouldn't see errors when operation succeeded.

1573.title: Email notification sent to wrong recipient
1573.description:
Issue with email notifications. Order confirmation email for my order was sent to a different customer.

I placed order ORD-2024-9485 and received confirmation email for order ORD-2024-9486 which belongs to another customer. That customer probably received my confirmation.

Ordered at https://orders.company.internal/checkout. Confirmation email received with wrong order details and different shipping address.

This is in the Notification Communication Service, email module. Production environment, Account: company-notify-prod, Project: EMAIL-SEND-01.

Chrome 119 on Windows 11, timestamp 2026-02-06 12:30:15 CET. Seems to happen when multiple orders processed simultaneously.

This is a serious privacy issue. Customers are seeing other customers' order details, addresses, and purchase information. We've received 5 complaints today.

We process 1,000 orders daily. If even 1% have this issue, that's 10 privacy breaches per day exposing customer data.

This is critical - privacy violation and potential GDPR breach. Need immediate fix and investigation of affected orders.

1574.title: Dashboard showing yesterday's data instead of today's
1574.description:
Issue with dashboard data. The sales dashboard is showing yesterday's numbers even though it's supposed to update in real-time.

It's February 6th at 4pm, but the dashboard shows "Last updated: February 5th 11:59 PM" and the sales figures haven't changed all day.

Viewing dashboard at https://analytics.company.internal/dashboard/sales. Date shows Feb 5, sales total $45,000 (yesterday's final number).

This is in the Analytics Reporting Service, dashboard module. Production environment, Account: company-analytics-prod, Project: DASH-DATA-01.

Firefox 121 on Windows 11, timestamp 2026-02-06 16:00:15 CET. Dashboard hasn't updated since midnight.

Management is making decisions based on outdated data. We're missing today's sales trends and can't respond to issues in real-time.

We have 50 users checking the dashboard throughout the day for business decisions. All are seeing stale data.

This needs immediate fix. Dashboard should show current day data, not previous day.

1575.title: Password reset link expires immediately instead of after 24 hours
1575.description:
Issue with password reset. Requested password reset link but when I click it 5 minutes later, it says the link has expired.

Requested reset at 2:00 PM, received email at 2:01 PM, clicked link at 2:06 PM. Got error "This password reset link has expired".

Reset requested at https://auth.company.internal/password/reset. Link in email goes to https://auth.company.internal/password/reset/abc123 which shows expired.

This is in the Security Compliance Service, password reset module. Production environment, Account: company-auth-prod, Project: AUTH-RESET-01.

Chrome 120 on macOS 14.1, timestamp 2026-02-06 14:00:15 PST. Happens with all password reset requests.

Users locked out of accounts because they can't reset passwords. Support is flooded with password reset tickets.

We receive 50 password reset requests daily. All are failing. Users can't access the system.

This is urgent - users locked out. Password reset links should be valid for 24 hours, not expire immediately.

1576.title: Pagination showing page 1 of 0 when results exist
1576.description:
Issue with search pagination. Search returns 150 results but pagination shows "Page 1 of 0" and I can't navigate to other pages.

Searched for "laptop" and got 150 results displayed (showing 20 per page). Pagination footer says "Page 1 of 0" and next/previous buttons are disabled.

Searching at https://catalog.company.internal/search?q=laptop shows results but broken pagination.

This is in the Search Discovery Service, pagination module. Production environment, Account: company-search-prod, Project: SEARCH-PAGE-01.

Safari 17 on iOS 17.2, timestamp 2026-02-06 13:45:22 PST. Affects all searches with multiple pages.

Users can only see first 20 results out of 150. They can't browse to see other products. Missing sales opportunities.

We have 500 searches daily with 40% returning multiple pages. That's 200 searches where users can't see all results.

This needs fix so users can navigate through all search results. Pagination should show correct page count.

1577.title: Form validation accepting invalid email addresses
1577.description:
Issue with email validation. The registration form accepts email addresses without @ symbol or domain.

Tried to register with email "johndoe" (no @ or domain) and the form accepted it. Also accepted "john@" and "@example.com".

Registering at https://auth.company.internal/register. Form validation passes for invalid emails like "test", "user@", "@domain.com".

This is in the Security Compliance Service, user registration module. Production environment, Account: company-auth-prod, Project: AUTH-REG-01.

Chrome 119 on Windows 11, timestamp 2026-02-06 15:30:47 CET. Email validation not working properly.

Users registering with invalid emails can't receive verification emails or password resets. Creating unusable accounts.

We have 20-30 registrations daily with 10% using invalid emails. That's 2-3 broken accounts per day.

This needs fix to properly validate email format before accepting registration. Should reject emails without proper format.

1578.title: Auto-save feature saving every keystroke causing performance issues
1578.description:
Issue with document auto-save. The system saves the document after every single keystroke, making typing very slow and laggy.

When I type in the document editor, there's a noticeable delay after each letter. The save indicator flashes constantly. System feels very sluggish.

Editing document at https://documents.company.internal/edit/DOC-2024-847. Every keystroke triggers a save operation.

This is in the Integration API Service, document editing module. Production environment, Account: company-docs-prod, Project: DOC-EDIT-01.

Firefox 121 on Ubuntu 22.04, timestamp 2026-02-06 16:15:33 PST. Makes document editing very slow.

Users complaining about slow, laggy typing experience. Some are using external editors because our system is too slow.

We have 100 active document editors daily. All experiencing performance issues. This is affecting productivity.

This needs fix to implement proper auto-save debouncing. Should save after user stops typing, not on every keystroke.

1579.title: Date picker showing dates from wrong month
1579.description:
Issue with date picker calendar. When I select March 2026, the calendar shows dates from February 2026 instead.

Clicked on date picker, selected March from dropdown. Calendar displayed shows February dates (1-29) with March label.

Using date picker at https://booking.company.internal/schedule. Month selector shows March but calendar shows February dates.

This is in the Order Management Service, scheduling module. Production environment, Account: company-booking-prod, Project: BOOK-DATE-01.

Chrome 120 on macOS 14.2, timestamp 2026-02-06 17:00:15 PST. Affects all month selections.

Users booking appointments for wrong dates. Someone trying to book for March 15 actually booked February 15.

We have 50 bookings daily with 20% using date picker. That's 10 potentially wrong bookings per day.

This needs immediate fix. Date picker should show correct month's dates when month is selected.

1580.title: Bulk delete operation deleting wrong records
1580.description:
Issue with bulk delete feature. When I select 5 items to delete, the system deletes 5 different items instead.

Selected items with IDs 101, 102, 103, 104, 105 for deletion. After confirming, checked and items 201, 202, 203, 204, 205 were deleted instead.

Using bulk delete at https://admin.company.internal/items/bulk-delete. Selected items not matching deleted items.

This is in the Order Management Service, admin module. Production environment, Account: company-admin-prod, Project: ADMIN-BULK-01.

Firefox 121 on Windows 11, timestamp 2026-02-06 17:30:47 CET. Happens with all bulk delete operations.

Critical data loss issue. Users deleting wrong records. Some important data has been permanently deleted by mistake.

We have 10-20 bulk delete operations weekly. If this affects all of them, we're losing important data.

This is critical - data integrity issue. Need immediate fix and investigation of what data was incorrectly deleted.

1581.title: Export to Excel producing corrupted files
1581.description:
Issue with Excel export. When I export data to Excel, the file downloads but Excel says it's corrupted and can't open it.

Exported sales report with 500 rows. File downloads as 'sales_report.xlsx' but when I try to open it, Excel shows error "Excel cannot open the file because the file format or file extension is not valid".

Exporting from https://reports.company.internal/sales/export?format=xlsx. Downloaded file appears corrupted.

This is in the Analytics Reporting Service, export module. Production environment, Account: company-reports-prod, Project: REPORT-EXPORT-02.

Chrome 120 on Windows 11, timestamp 2026-02-06 18:00:22 CET. All Excel exports failing.

Users can't get their reports in Excel format. Finance team needs Excel files for their analysis and budgeting.

We have 30-40 Excel export requests daily. All are producing corrupted files. Users forced to use CSV instead.

This needs urgent fix. Excel export is critical for business reporting and analysis.

1582.title: User profile image upload not working on mobile
1582.description:
Issue with profile image upload. On mobile devices, when I try to upload a profile picture, nothing happens after selecting the image.

Tap "Upload Photo", select image from gallery, but upload doesn't start. No progress indicator, no error message. Desktop works fine.

Trying to upload at https://profile.company.internal/edit on mobile. Image selection works but upload doesn't trigger.

This is in the Security Compliance Service, user profile module. Production environment, Account: company-profile-prod, Project: PROFILE-IMG-01.

Safari on iOS 17.2, timestamp 2026-02-06 18:30:15 PST. Also tested on Android Chrome with same issue.

Mobile users can't update their profile pictures. About 60% of our users access the system from mobile devices.

We have 20-30 profile updates daily with 60% from mobile. That's 12-18 failed uploads per day.

This needs fix for mobile compatibility. Profile image upload should work on all devices.

1583.title: Session timeout modal appearing behind other content
1583.description:
Issue with session timeout warning. The modal that warns about session expiring appears behind the page content and can't be clicked.

Session timeout warning appears but it's behind the main content. I can see it's there but can't click the "Extend Session" button. Session expires while I'm trying to click it.

Working at https://portal.company.internal/dashboard when timeout modal appears. Modal visible but not clickable.

This is in the Security Compliance Service, session management module. Production environment, Account: company-auth-prod, Project: AUTH-SESSION-02.

Chrome 119 on Windows 11, timestamp 2026-02-06 19:00:33 CET. Happens on all pages.

Users getting logged out because they can't interact with the timeout warning. Losing unsaved work.

We have 5,000 active users daily with sessions timing out every 30 minutes. Many can't extend their sessions due to this bug.

This needs urgent fix. Timeout modal must appear on top of all content so users can extend their sessions.

1584.title: Calendar events showing in wrong timezone
1584.description:
Issue with calendar display. Events scheduled for 2pm PST are showing as 10pm PST in the calendar.

Created meeting for 2pm Pacific Time. Calendar shows it at 10pm. When I check the event details, it says 2pm but displays at 10pm in the calendar grid.

Viewing calendar at https://calendar.company.internal/month. Event times displayed incorrectly.

This is in the Order Management Service, scheduling module. Production environment, Account: company-calendar-prod, Project: CAL-TZ-01.

Firefox 121 on Ubuntu 22.04, timestamp 2026-02-06 19:30:15 PST. Affects all calendar events.

Users missing meetings because times shown are wrong. Scheduling conflicts because calendar shows wrong availability.

We have 200 meetings scheduled daily. All showing at wrong times in calendar view.

This is critical - people missing important meetings. Calendar must show events at correct times.

1585.title: Print preview showing blank page
1585.description:
Issue with print functionality. When I try to print a report, the print preview shows a blank page instead of the report content.

Clicked Print button on sales report. Print dialog opens but preview is completely blank. If I proceed with printing, I get blank pages.

Trying to print from https://reports.company.internal/sales/monthly. Print preview empty.

This is in the Analytics Reporting Service, print module. Production environment, Account: company-reports-prod, Project: REPORT-PRINT-01.

Chrome 120 on Windows 11, timestamp 2026-02-06 20:00:47 CET. Affects all report printing.

Users can't print reports for physical filing or offline review. Finance needs printed copies for audit trail.

We have 30-40 print requests daily. All producing blank pages.

This needs urgent fix. Print functionality is required for compliance and record-keeping.

1771.title: API rate limiting not working correctly
1771.description:
User action: I was configuring API rate limits for our production environment and testing the endpoint by sending requests through our load testing tool to verify the 100 requests/minute limit was being enforced.

Failure observed: The rate limiter is not enforcing the configured limit. When I send 500 requests in a single minute, all of them succeed with 200 OK responses. Expected behavior is that requests beyond 100 should receive 429 Too Many Requests errors. No rate limit headers are being returned in the response. This is causing server CPU to spike to 95% during peak hours.

Affected resource: API Gateway service, rate-limiter module. Environment: Production. Project ID: API-PROD-2847. Account: company-api-prod. Endpoint: https://api.company.internal/v2/orders

Scope: api-gateway/rate-limiter

1772.title: Database connection pool exhaustion
1772.description:
User action: I was running our daily batch processing job that processes customer orders.

Failure observed: The application is throwing connection pool errors and the batch job fails.

1773.title: Memory leak in worker process
1773.description:
User action: I was monitoring our background worker processes that handle async email notifications. The workers run continuously processing messages from the queue and sending emails to customers.

Failure observed: Worker process memory consumption grows steadily over time. Starting memory is ~512MB but after 24 hours it reaches 4GB+. At that point the worker becomes unresponsive and stops processing messages. The Kubernetes pod eventually gets OOMKilled. Heap dumps show increasing instances of EmailTemplate objects that are never garbage collected. This is happening on all 8 worker replicas.

Affected resource: Notification Worker Service, email-sender module. Environment: Production. Kubernetes namespace: notifications-prod. Pod pattern: email-worker-*. Project ID: NOTIF-WORKER-847. Account: company-notifications.

Scope: worker-service/memory-management

1774.title: Authentication tokens expiring prematurely
1774.description:
Failure observed: Users are being forcibly logged out after 2-3 hours of activity. The JWT token should be valid for 24 hours but gets rejected early.

Affected resource: Authentication Service, token-validator module. Environment: Production. Auth server: auth.company.internal. Project ID: AUTH-PROD-001.

1775.title: Search indexing delays
1775.description:
User action: I was adding new product listings to our catalog through the admin interface. After saving a new product, I immediately searched for it using the product search feature to verify it was correctly indexed.

Failure observed: Newly created products are not appearing in search results for 25-30 minutes after creation. Our SLA requires indexing within 5 minutes. The product exists in the database (direct query returns it) but Elasticsearch does not have it. The indexer queue shows messages backing up with processing times of 1800+ seconds. Search queries return '0 results' for new product SKUs until the delay passes.

Affected resource: Search Service, product-indexer module. Environment: Production. Elasticsearch cluster: search-prod.company.internal:9200. Index: products-v2. Project ID: SEARCH-PROD-472. Account: company-catalog.

Scope: search-service/indexer

1776.title: Webhook delivery failures
1776.description:
User action: I configured a webhook endpoint in our integration settings to receive order status updates.

Affected resource: Webhook Delivery Service, outbound-dispatcher module. Environment: Production. Webhook ID: WH-8847291.
